app.title: StreamVerse
settings.title: App Settings
settings.cookieGuideBody: Use Manual method to import cookies. You can also try Auto-detect for one-click extraction.
settings.cookieManualStep1: 1. Open and log into the platform in Chrome or Edge
settings.cookieManualStep2: 2. Press F12 (or right-click → Inspect) to open DevTools → switch to Network tab
settings.cookieManualStep3: 3. Refresh the page, filter by Fetch/XHR or Doc type in the toolbar — these requests usually contain cookies
settings.cookieManualStep4: 4. Click any request, find the Cookie field in Request Headers, and copy its full value
settings.cookieManualStep5: 5. Paste into the text box below and save settings
settings.cookieOnceHint: Cookies only need to be obtained once — they are saved and reused automatically.
settings.cookieTextPlaceholder: Paste the Cookie value copied from your browser
settings.autoReveal: Reveal file in file manager after download
settings.proxyHintYoutube: Only YouTube uses the proxy; Douyin and Bilibili stay direct.
settings.notifyOnComplete: Send system notification on download complete
content.caption: Caption

module.youtube-single.label: YouTube Single Video
module.youtube-single.description: Parse YouTube video and download in selected format.
